item.label: [PKT-FND-005](task-0036): Packet/Test Harness Scaffolding
item.summary: Create packet and test harness scaffolding

body:
# Description

Create packet and test harness scaffolding.

# [PKT-FND-005](task-0026): Packet/Test Harness Scaffolding

## Purpose

Create packet and test harness scaffolding.

## Scope

- Packet structure
- Test harness setup
- Integration points

## Implementation

1. Define packet structure
2. Create test harness
3. Set up integration points

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Packet structure defined
2. Test harness functional
3. Integration points work
